meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for ideas. Learn to build automated passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid, high-converting market deployment.
content.answer_block: The 'no idea' trap is a failure of observation, not creativity. Solve this by building micro-SaaS tools that automate repetitive, high-friction tasks for specific professional niches. Use Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to iterate your MVP, focusing on recurring subscription models that generate sustainable, passive revenue streams.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You stare at a blinking cursor, waiting for a 'million-dollar idea' to strike like lightning, while the market continues to suffer from thousands of small, painful inefficiencies that people are desperate to pay to solve. Real wealth isn't found in a singular epiphany; it is found in the relentless pursuit of solving 'boring' problems at scale.

Today, we pivot from passive dreaming to aggressive execution. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural velocity and Claude Code for intelligent, autonomous implementation, you will stop waiting for inspiration and start building assets. We are going to turn your technical capability into a recurring revenue engine.

steps.title: Identify High-Margin Micro-Problems
steps.description: Analyze LinkedIn or niche forums for 'How do I automate...' queries. Focus on tasks that take 30 minutes but are done daily.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a market researcher. Identify 5 high-friction, repetitive workflows for digital marketers that can be solved with a browser-based automation tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Search current top 50 trending SaaS micro-problems on IndieHackers and summarize by revenue potential.'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Create a lean skeleton that focuses on the core value proposition. Don't build features; build the solution to one specific pain point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable Next.js and Supabase architecture for a micro-SaaS that processes user inputs via OpenAI API and stores results in a dashboard.

steps.title: Implement Core Automation Logic
steps.description: Use AI to write the business logic that handles the user's task automatically, ensuring the output is high-quality and consistent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust service layer that takes a URL, scrapes metadata, and generates a SEO-optimized blog post using GPT-4o.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement the scraping service in src/lib/scraper.ts using cheerio and openai-sdk'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe for Passive Billing
steps.description: Implement subscription logic immediately. If you aren't collecting money, you aren't building a business; you're building a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Stripe checkout flow for a monthly subscription model with a 7-day free trial.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add-feature 'Stripe subscription checkout with webhook handlers for user status updates'

steps.title: Deploy and Automate Monitoring
steps.description: Ship to production and set up automated error logging so you can sleep while the software works.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for Vercel that includes environment variable validation and database migration checks.

pro_tips: Target 'tired' industries like legal or logistics; they pay more for simple automation than trendy tech sectors.
Build a 'concierge MVP' first—do the work manually behind the scenes before automating the code to prove the market exists.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests; high coverage prevents support tickets that kill your passive income flow.
Focus on churn reduction: add a 'usage report' email that sends every Monday, proving the value your tool provided.
The best feature is 'speed of onboarding'. If it takes more than 60 seconds to get value, your conversion rate will crater.
content.next_steps: After deployment, spend 80% of your time on distribution—cold emailing target users or posting in niche communities—and only 20% on further feature development.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. Your next revenue stream is waiting for the code you write today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
